debug_info.goal:
P : Erdos392.Params
p : ℕ
hp : p ≤ Erdos392.Params.L P
⊢ ↑(Erdos392.Factorization.balance (Erdos392.Params.n P) (Erdos392.Params.initial P) p) ≥
    -↑(Erdos392.Params.M P) * Real.log ↑(Erdos392.Params.n P) -
      ↑(Erdos392.Params.M P) * ↑(Erdos392.Params.L P) ^ 2 * ↑(primeCounting (Erdos392.Params.n P))

failed_attempts:
-- We establish a coarse lower bound: balance >= -v_p(n!) >= -n.
  -- Then we rely on the parameter sizes (n > L^2) to argue n <= M log n + M L^2 pi(n).
  have h_bal_ge : (P.initial.balance p : ℝ) ≥ -(P.n : ℝ) := by
    rw [Factorization.balance, Int.cast_sub, Int.cast_natCast, Int.cast_natCast]
    have h_fact_le : (P.n.factorial.factorization p : ℝ) ≤ P.n :=
      exact_mod_cast Nat.factorization_factorial_le_self P.n p
    have h_sum_nonneg : (0 : ℝ) ≤ P.initial.sum (fun m ↦ m.factorization p) :=
      Nat.cast_nonneg _
    linarith
  apply h_bal_ge.trans
  rw [neg_le_sub_iff_le_add, neg_mul, ← neg_add', neg_le_neg_iff]
  -- The inequality n <= M log n + M L^2 pi(n) holds for relevant P.
  sorry
